title: Mindable - Digital Mental Health Therapeutics
problem: Access to specialized mental health treatment for conditions like panic disorder is limited and often requires long wait times.
solution: Digital therapeutic program for panic disorder, combining CBT-based content, exercises, and therapist support through an app.
technology: DTx app, CBT modules, progress tracking
varden_fit: Moderate — specialized DTx could partner with mental health providers on Varden.
notes: Specialized mental health DTx. DiGA pathway in Germany.
